Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 7, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Continued To Apr-24-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Lawrence A. Strick, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Sherri Cytanovich and Arthur W. Curley. Esq. represented Defendant, San Francisco 49ers.
Based on evidence received, Court grants the settlement as prayed for in the petition. The settlement is in the form of a structured agreement and in the best interest of the minor. Terms placed on the record, in camera, out of the presence of the minor. Counsel to present order for signature. The matter is continued to April 24, 2003. No appearance by the plaintiff is required, only counsel to appear and present medical records to the Court.
